name: pho
input: one big bowl of phở bò with brisket and rare steak, extra bean sprouts and basil
notes: Ground truth reconciled from USDA FoodData Central (rice noodle + beef shank + bone broth aggregate) + Vietnamese Ministry of Health 2017 composition table for phở bò. Typical 'big bowl' ~700g serving, ~520 kcal ±10%. Rare steak + brisket combo adds ~4g fat vs plain.
